sources.title: Their Own Desire (1929)
sources.description: I've been researching newly public domain films from 1929 and earlier, so I'm uploading the best possible copies that I can find. Norma Shearer was nominated for a Best Actress Oscar for her role in this film, though she lost, to herself no less, for another role from the same Academy Awards year. This film was released the same year as its source material, although it doesn't really suffer for it. The film was a modest success, but really the main draw of the film is Ms. Shearer's performance.

sources.title: Their Own Desire (MGM, 1929) NORMA SHEARER🍕 ROBERT MONTGOMERY
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Presents CLASSIC MOVIE MONDAY
Stars: Norma Shearer, Robert Montgomery, Lewis Stone
Director: E. Mason Hopper

Discover a pre-Code romantic drama from the dawn of the sound era that captures the emotional complexity of family, love, and loyalty with the grace and glamour of early Hollywood.

The film stars Norma Shearer in one of her earliest talking roles, delivering a critically praised performance that earned her an Academy Award nomination. She’s joined by Robert Montgomery, in his film debut, along with Belle Bennett and Helene Millard. Their powerful portrayals bring depth and tension to a story about a young woman caught between her parents' divorce and her own unexpected romance.

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

Noted for its elegant production values, art direction, and early use of synchronized sound, this film reflects MGM’s high standards during a pivotal moment in cinematic history. An essential watch for classic film enthusiasts and fans of Golden Age Hollywood.

🎭 Subscribe for more Oscar-winning films, vintage musicals, and Pre-Code Hollywood gems!

#TheirOwnDesire1929 #NormaShearer #RobertMontgomery #EMasonHopper #MGMStudios #PreCodeHollywood #ClassicCinema #OldHollywood #GoldenAgeOfHollywood #PizzaFLIX #OldHollywood #JazzAgeCinema #EarlyTalkie

metadata.Plot: Lally is a rich girl whose father writes books and plays Polo. After 23 years of marriage, he decides to divorce his wife, and marry Mrs. Chevers. This sours Lally on all men, while on vacation she meets Jack, who succeeds in stealing her heart. The trouble begins when Lally discovers that Jack is the son of Beth Chevers, her father's illicit lover.
metadata.Writer: Sarita Fuller, Frances Marion, James Forbes
metadata.Actors: Norma Shearer, Belle Bennett, Lewis Stone
